title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim's hiring startup Paraform paid human recruiters $50 million while rejecting the AI-replacement trend, achieving 10x revenue growth with customers like Palantir and Rippling. The interview covers Kim's insight that AI has made hiring noisier, not faster, requiring 5,000 cold emails per hire versus 500 five years ago, and argues that human recruiters, not algorithms, are the core competitive advantage.
